name: First Liberty Bank
description_short: First Liberty Bank is an FDIC-insured community bank serving Oklahoma City and Norman with personal and business banking, lending, and mortgage products.
description_long:
First Liberty Bank operates as a traditional full-service community bank headquartered in the Oklahoma City area with branches in Oklahoma City and Norman. The bank is FDIC-insured and backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, providing deposit protection up to federal limits. The institution maintains a comprehensive digital presence at myfirstliberty.com and serves both individual consumers and business clients across multiple market segments.

The bank offers a broad range of financial products including personal checking accounts (Max Cash Checking, Max Cash Back Checking, Premier Checking, Freedom Checking), personal savings products (Max Saver, First Saver, Young Saver, Platinum Money Market), Certificates of Deposit, personal credit cards, auto loans, RV loans, personal term loans, and home equity lines of credit. For business clients, First Liberty provides commercial checking accounts (Commercial Checking, Small Business +1 Checking, Enterprise Business Checking), business savings, business credit cards, business loans, and specialized treasury management services including ACH, remote deposit capture, and positive pay functionality. The mortgage division offers conventional loans, FHA, VA, USDA, jumbo mortgages, physician mortgages, residential construction loans, and specialty products like temporary buydown loans and portfolio loans.

First Liberty Bank differentiates itself through specialized healthcare banking division with exclusive products for physicians and dentists, including practice acquisition financing, equipment financing, and physician home mortgages. The bank emphasizes relationship banking with face-to-face mortgage consultations and dedicated loan officers. They offer unique products such as Family Opportunity Mortgage, Community Heroes Mortgage, and Community Experts Loans. The institution provides enterprise-level services including merchant services, treasury management team support, lockbox services, and IntraFi deposit network access for high-balance clients.

As a traditional community bank, First Liberty Bank is best suited for customers seeking personalized service and local decision-making rather than the lowest rates or fastest digital-only operations. The bank maintains standard banking hours and physical locations, which may not suit customers requiring 24/7 digital support. No information is available on the website regarding APR ranges, specific fee schedules, or competitive rate comparisons, requiring customers to contact the bank directly for pricing details. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal checking accounts (Max Cash Checking, Max Cash Back Checking, Premier Checking, Freedom Checking)
Personal savings accounts and Money Market accounts
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) for personal and business use
Mortgage products (conventional, FHA, VA, USDA, physician mortgages, construction loans)
Business checking and savings accounts with treasury management services
Healthcare practice lending (dental practice, physician practice, physician mortgages)
Business loans, commercial lending, and accounts receivable financing
Home equity lines of credit and 2nd mortgage products
Digital banking services including remote deposit capture and ACH processing
pros: FDIC-insured deposits with full federal protection backing
Specialized Healthcare Banking Division with exclusive physician and dentist products
Face-to-face mortgage consultations with dedicated loan officers involved throughout lending process
Comprehensive business services including treasury management, merchant services, and remote deposit capture
Unique specialty mortgage products including Community Heroes Mortgage and temporary buydown loans
IntraFi deposit network access for high-balance account holders seeking deposit diversification
Established community bank presence with multiple physical branch locations in Oklahoma
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to Oklahoma City and Norman areas only
No pricing, APR ranges, or fee schedules published on website—requires direct contact for rate shopping
No indication of 24/7 digital banking support or mobile app capabilities mentioned on website
Website does not prominently feature competitive advantages or rate comparisons versus competitors
Vulnerable to phone number spoofing scams requiring customer vigilance (as noted in security alert)

contact.address: 9601 N May Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73120

best_for: Healthcare professionals (physicians, dentists) seeking specialized practice lending and mortgage products
Small to mid-sized business owners needing relationship banking and treasury management services
Oklahoma City and Norman residents seeking local community bank service with in-person consultations
High-net-worth individuals wanting deposit diversification through IntraFi network access
diagnosis: First Liberty Bank is best for Oklahoma-based consumers and business owners who value relationship banking, in-person consultations, and specialized products like healthcare practice lending. The main caveat is that the bank's limited geographic presence, lack of published pricing, and absence of prominent digital-first features make it less suitable for rate shoppers, customers outside Oklahoma, or those requiring 24/7 digital support.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 9601 N May Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73120
